presentation: conversational popup (styled as sibling of homepage AI chat blob .aic)

success_message.headline: Thank you {first_name} — we're on it.
success_message.body: We've received your request to connect with a trusted local professional. Our team is reviewing your details and preparing to introduce you to someone who aligns with your current goals — so you can move forward with clarity and support.
success_message.closer: We're here to help you take the next step, {first_name}.

slides.label: Who would you like an introduction to?
options: APPRAISER – A fair, professional assessment of property value
INSPECTOR – Peace of mind through a thorough property evaluation
INSURANCE BROKER – Confidence you're properly covered
ATTORNEY / TITLE TEAM – Confidence your deal will close smoothly
REALTOR / WHOLESALER – Access to exclusive deals and top local agents
FINANCIAL PLANNER – Personalized, tax-smart wealth advice
ACCOUNTANT / UNDERWRITER – Accuracy and insight into your finances
BUILDER / CONTRACTOR – A trusted team to build or renovate on time and on budget
ARCHITECT / DESIGNER – A design that reflects your vision and lifestyle
MORTGAGE ADVISOR – The right loan strategy for your long-term goals
NOT SURE YET – I just need to talk to someone and get pointed in the right direction

slides.label: What is MOST important to you? (pick up to 3)
options: Trust in the person or team I'm working with
Confidence I'm making the right decision
Fast response and clear communication
A smooth, stress-free process
Personalized advice for my situation
Transparent pricing and no surprises
Deep expertise and industry knowledge
Help navigating complex paperwork or red tape
Creative solutions or out-of-the-box strategies
Long-term support beyond this transaction

slides.label: Anything else you'd like to share?
SMS Consent
slides.consent_text: I Consent to Receive SMS Notifications, Alerts & Occasional Marketing Communication from company. Message frequency varies. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP to (954) 993-1625 for assistance. You can reply STOP to unsubscribe at any time.

compliance.division_line: Stairway Mortgage is a division of NEXA Mortgage LLC.

open_flags: Success message personalizes with first name.
Phone Verify = placeholder OTP 000000 (same as Build A House).
